integration-readiness.reason: The migration keeps execution layers separate, updates downstream routing surfaces, regenerates the registry, prunes stale live skill symlinks, and adds graph tooling without changing hook/runtime behavior.

evidence-quality.reason: Evidence includes registry validation, tier checker output, local todo coverage counts, stale Markdown-link search, install/prune proof, graph count equality, and browser-render proof for the static graph.

implementation-plan.reason: All three tickets followed the planned dependency order: consolidate video skills, audit the regenerated registry, then build graph tooling from the audited registry.

next_action: Commit the batch when the operator wants these repo changes recorded.
